components.name: PageHeader
components.description: Page title with breadcrumbs and actions

components.name: StickyHeader
components.description: Header that pins on scroll with optional border/shadow

ai.usage: When creating a header that stays fixed at top on scroll
ai.composition: Use with BreadcrumbTrail for navigation, PageHeader for titles

components.name: StatCard
components.description: Metric card with value and trend indicator

components.name: SectionHeader
components.description: Section title with optional description and action button

ai.usage: When displaying a section title with optional description and action button
ai.composition: Use with StatCard for dashboard sections, EmptyState for list pages
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for page-level titles - use PageHeader instead

components.name: EntityCard
components.description: Rich data card with badges, progress bars, avatars, and metadata

ai.usage: When displaying entity details with status, progress, and metadata
ai.composition: Use with CardGrid for lists, Pagination for navigation
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for simple text-only items

components.name: CardGrid
components.description: Responsive grid layout for cards with configurable columns and gap

ai.usage: When displaying multiple cards in a responsive grid layout
ai.composition: Use with EntityCard, StatCard for card layouts
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for single cards or non-card content

components.name: MetricCard
components.description: KPI display with value, trend indicator, and optional comparison

ai.usage: When displaying KPIs and metrics with trend indicators
ai.composition: Use with CardGrid for dashboard layouts

components.name: ActivityTimeline
components.description: Vertical timeline showing activity history with status indicators

ai.usage: When displaying chronological activity or event history
ai.composition: Use with EntityCard for detailed views
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for static non-chronological content

components.name: SearchBar
components.description: Search input with debounce and clear button

ai.usage: When adding search functionality to lists or pages
ai.composition: Use with DataTable, EntityCard list for filtering
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for simple onetime search without debounce needs

components.name: FilterChip
components.description: Selectable filter tag with optional count and remove button

ai.composition: Use with SearchBar for complete filter experience
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for single static labels

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Zero-state illustration with message and CTA

components.name: LoadingOverlay
components.description: Full-screen or inline spinner with contextual messages

ai.usage: When showing loading state for data fetching or processing
ai.composition: Use with SkeletonGenerator for content placeholders
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for quick operations under 200ms

components.name: ErrorFallback
components.description: Error boundary UI with retry action and error ID

ai.usage: When wrapping components that may throw errors
ai.composition: Use with LoadingOverlay for complete error handling
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for expected error states - use conditional rendering

components.name: ToastManager
components.description: Notification container with position and theme configuration

ai.usage: When displaying toast notifications anywhere in the app
ai.composition: Place once at app root, use toast() function to show notifications
ai.antiPatterns: Don't create multiple instances - use single instance at root

components.name: SkeletonGenerator
components.description: Automatic skeleton screens matching data shapes (card, list, table)

ai.usage: When showing loading placeholders while data is fetching
ai.composition: Use with LoadingOverlay for complete loading experience
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for static content or after data loads

components.name: ConnectionStatus
components.description: Badge showing WebSocket/API connection status with animated states

ai.usage: When displaying real-time connection status in header or status bar
ai.composition: Use with ToastManager for connection error notifications
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for static status indicators

components.name: ProgressTracker
components.description: Multi-step process tracker with horizontal or vertical orientation

ai.usage: When showing multi-step progress for wizards or workflows
ai.composition: Use with FormWizard for multi-step forms

components.name: ConfirmationDialog
components.description: Contextual confirmation dialog with warning severity levels

ai.usage: When requiring user confirmation for destructive or important actions
ai.composition: Use with ToastManager for success feedback after confirm

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Page navigation with first/last buttons and ellipsis

ai.usage: When displaying paginated data or long lists
ai.composition: Use with DataTable, EntityCard list, or any paginated content
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for fewer than 2 pages

components.name: BreadcrumbTrail
components.description: Dynamic breadcrumbs with history dropdown and collapse support

ai.usage: When showing navigation path in hierarchical content
ai.composition: Use with PageHeader for complete page header
ai.antiPatterns: Don't use for flat pages without hierarchy
